name: Panthers
description:
'''Panthers''' is an American [[post hardcore]] band from [[Brooklyn]], New York City. The ''[[Village Voice]]'' described them as "groundbreaking dissonant HC ([[hardcore punk|hardcore]]) with [[The Rolling Stones|Rolling Stones]] swagger." Three members were previously in the screamo band [[Orchid (screamo band)|Orchid]].  Panthers have released four records.  The most recent two, ''The Trick'' and ''Things Are Strange'' were released on [[Vice Magazine|Vice Records]]. Prior to that they released via Dim Mak Records and Troubleman Unlimited.

They began as a side project by members of the bands Orchid, [[Turing Machine (band)|Turing Machine]], and The Red Scare.

Kip Uhlhorn went on to form the band [[Cloudland Canyon (band)|Cloudland Canyon]] with Simon Wojan of King Khan & the Shrines.
